productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Nuevo Black Casual Shoe
description: buckaroo is known for its exquisite craft in leather hide. This Buckaroo men Nuevo Black Casual shoe emphasizes quality and comfort without compromising on style. This tactile pair is a fashion forward yet comfortable foot-style choice. Pair it with plain denims, full sleeve shirts and tonal belts. Upper Made of full grain leather upper with overlays for structure Lace-up system for a customised Fit Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fit Perforations from the midfoot to the heel for breathability Well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Haul loop at the collar Leather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers Outsole Durable rubber outsole with textured patterns and grooves on the forefoot and heel for enhanced grip and traction Outsole reinforced onto the backfoot as a heel guard for enhanced durability Shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
